title: Live adapter retrieves the live-real-world claim boundary

items.text: Live adapter claim boundary: qmd and ELF may be reported as `live_real_world` only when generated JSON and Markdown artifacts include command evidence, artifact paths, and typed status.
Incorrect claim: fixture-only ELF scoring is enough to imply live service behavior for real-world jobs.

timeline.summary: An invalid claim conflated fixture-only scoring with live service behavior.
The live claim boundary requires generated JSON/Markdown artifacts and typed status.

prompt.content: When may qmd and ELF be reported as live_real_world in the real-world benchmark?

must_include.text: Live adapter claim boundary: qmd and ELF may be reported as `live_real_world` only when generated JSON and Markdown artifacts include command evidence, artifact paths, and typed status.

must_not_include: Incorrect claim: fixture-only ELF scoring is enough to imply live service behavior for real-world jobs.

required_evidence.quote: generated JSON and Markdown artifacts include command evidence

answer_correctness.criteria: States the artifact and typed-status boundary for live_real_world claims.

evidence_grounding.criteria: Uses the live-real-world claim boundary evidence.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true

acceptable_phrases: The live adapter did not retrieve that evidence.
